data.title: JPMorgan halts accounts of 2 stablecoin startups - BlindPay and Kontigo - over sanctions worries, citing ties to sanctioned areas.
data.description: Accounts associated with stablecoin startups BlindPay and Kontigo, which are backed by Y Combinator, have been frozen by JPMorgan. The accounts were flagged due to potential exposure to sanctioned jurisdictions.

data.title: XRP could trade flat in 2026 until bullish factors surface. Analysts predict a potential surge in second half thanks to "more constructive conditions."
data.description: In the latter part of 2026, there is a possibility of XRP experiencing a significant increase in value as stated by crypto analyst Jake Kennis.

data.title: Bitcoin experienced a bear market in 2025 with new all-time highs in October. Mow predicts a decade-long bull run.
data.description: In October, the price of Bitcoin soared to new record levels. However, Samson Mow, the founder of Jan3, characterized the year as a "bear market" despite this achievement. Mow predicts a significant uptrend in the future for the cryptocurrency market. The price surge saw Bitcoin hitting all-time highs, with analysts expecting a bullish trend in the market moving forward.

data.title: Bernie Sanders criticizes wealth inequality, pointing out that 10 billionaires saw a $730 billion increase in wealth in 2025.
data.description: Senator Bernie Sanders has expressed criticism towards the increasing wealth gap in the United States, particularly noting the significant rise in the fortunes of a select group of billionaires. This comes as Elon Musk achieves a historic milestone by reaching a net worth of approximately $750 billion. Senator Sanders raised concerns about the widening income disparity in the country during an address on Friday, emphasizing that while many Americans are facing difficulties in affording basic essentials, the collective wealth of just 10 billionaires saw an astonishing increase of $730 billion in 2025. Through a statement on a platform, Sanders highlighted that the ongoing economic crisis revolves around the escalating inequality in income and wealth. He labeled the scenario as "immoral and unsustainable," referencing Forbes data and urging for measures to combat the emerging oligarchy. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Interact Marketing introduces The Internet Marketing Machine for professional & home services to enhance digital presence - PRNewswire - Dec. 26, 2025.
data.description: In Jamestown, New York, on December 26, 2025, Interact Marketing released The Internet Marketing Machine, a recently launched service incorporating AI technology to enhance digital presence and campaign management for professional and home services businesses. The service aims to improve online visibility and marketing strategies for companies in various industries.

data.title: Financial services firms are turning to RankOS™ by NEWMEDIA.COM for AI-powered search to improve credibility. AI requires strict verification for financial info and only 18% of financial brands meet criteria.
data.description: In Denver, Colorado, an AI visibility operating system called RankOS™, developed by NEWMEDIA.COM, is being utilized by financial services firms to improve their presence on AI-powered search platforms. The system addresses the gap between traditional SEO and AI visibility, focusing on sectors like banking, wealth management, and insurance. Steve Morris, the founder and CEO, highlighted the importance of authority signals and third-party validation in gaining trust from AI systems. Financial services and insurance are considered high-risk categories for AI visibility due to regulatory oversight, consumer protection requirements, and the potential impact of misinformation. According to recent analysis, less than 18% of financial brands are effectively recognized by AI systems.

data.title: Hong Kong fire fueled by corruption and poor materials. Govt ignored warnings, leading to deadly inferno.
data.description: Documentation reveals that government departments consistently downplayed residents' alerts about corrupt practices and low-quality materials that contributed to a fatal fire.

data.title: Stock market at record highs as 2025 ends, with Tesla, Nvidia, Google, and Apple close to buy points. Dow Jones Futures strong.
data.description: As 2025 comes to a close, the stock market is reaching new record highs. Companies like Tesla, Nvidia, Google, and Apple are currently slightly above their buy points. In the latest market trends, these giants are leading the way with strong performances. Dow Jones Futures indicate a positive outlook, with Tesla and Nvidia standing out among the top performers in buy areas. The overall market remains robust as the year nears its end.

data.title: Ethereum's total value locked (TVL) may increase tenfold by 2026 due to stablecoins, tokenized RWAs, and sovereign wealth fund interest.
data.description: An anticipated rise in stablecoins, tokenized real-world assets (RWAs), and increasing interest from sovereign wealth funds may lead to a significant growth in Ethereum's Total Value Locked (TVL) by 2026, as stated by the co-CEO of Sharplink.

data.title: Gold Star Distribution Inc. recalls FDA-regulated products in 3 states due to rodent and avian contamination.
data.description: On December 26, 2025, Gold Star Distribution, Inc. announced a recall of all FDA regulated items mentioned in the press release because they were found to be contaminated with rodents and avian species. Consumers who have interacted with or consumed these products may be at risk...

data.title: CareOregon data security breach on Oct 27, 2025, unauthorized access to member info: names, DOB, health plan, Medicaid ID.
data.description: In Portland, Oregon, CareOregon discovered on October 27, 2025, that unauthorized individuals accessed member data. Potentially compromised information consists of individuals' first and last names, date of birth, health plan details, and Medicaid ID numbers.

data.title: Jackson Care Connect reports unauthorized access to member data on Oct 27, 2025, including names, DOB, health plan info, and Medicaid ID.
data.description: In Portland, Oregon, during October 27, 2025, Jackson Care Connect discovered unauthorized access to member information. The compromised data includes individuals' full names, birth dates, health plan details, and Medicaid IDs.

data.title: Unauthorized access to member data at Columbia Pacific CCO discovered on Oct 27, 2025. Information accessed includes names, birth dates, health plan details.
data.description: In Portland, Oregon, on December 26, 2025, Columbia Pacific CCO discovered on October 27, 2025, unauthorized access to member data where individuals viewed sensitive information without consent. The exposed data comprises personal details like first and last names, dates of birth, health plan specifics, and Medicaid ID numbers. The incident underscores the breach in privacy and security, affecting potentially multiple individuals within the database.

data.title: MEDIROM partners with world to deploy "Proof of Human" tech in Japan, envisioned by Altman and Blania.
data.description: Rolling out a revolutionary "Proof of Human" infrastructure across Japan, this cutting-edge technology was conceptualized by Sam Altman and Alex Blania. The initiative aims to introduce advanced systems that verify users as genuine humans, thereby enhancing security and trust in online interactions. With a significant investment of [X amount] being allocated towards this project, it is set to transform the digital landscape in Japan and beyond.

data.title: Southpoint Holdings sells 1,000,000 shares (2.93% stake) in Fennec Pharmaceuticals Inc. on Dec. 24, 2025.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, Southpoint Capital Advisors LP, managing funds, sold 1,000,000 common shares of Fennec Pharmaceuticals Inc., equivalent to roughly 2.93% of the total Common Shares available. This decision was made in compliance with securities regulations.

data.title: Parents commonly mention Enchanted Fairies' meaningful experience for kids, emphasizing interaction and engagement in reviews nationwide.
data.description: The article discusses the importance of analyzing patterns in parent reviews when researching children's photography experiences, with Enchanted Fairies being a standout based on tens of thousands of parent reviews. The reviews showcase consistent themes such as the experience being meaningful beyond just photos, feeling like a special event for kids, and emphasizing interaction and engagement with photographers. Parents often mention that the sessions are memorable and create a supportive environment. Overall, the article highlights the positive impact and unique experience that Enchanted Fairies offer to families.

data.title: Stock market slightly down post-Christmas; Nvidia can't boost Dow; Palantir falls below mark.来源: Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Today, the stock market saw a slight decline as the major indexes closed slightly lower on Friday after the Christmas holiday. Nvidia's performance was not enough to boost the Dow, which ended the day in negative territory. Palantir also experienced a drop, falling below a certain benchmark. The live coverage of these events can be found on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Outlook Therapeutics granted 150,000 stock options to two new employees at $2.01 per share.
data.description: In Iselin, New Jersey, on December 26, 2025, Outlook Therapeutics, Inc. revealed that it granted stock options to acquire 150,000 shares of the company's common stock to two fresh employees on December 19, 2025. These options have an exercise price of $2.01 per share. This move was made by the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors to boost the standard of care for bevacizumab in treating retina diseases. Outlook Therapeutics, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol OTLK.
